title: Pinalia sopoetanica
taxonomy: Pinalia sopoetanica belongs to the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. It is a genus of flowering plants, and Pinalia sopoetanica is a specific species within this genus. The Orchidaceae family is one of the largest and most diverse groups of flowering plants, with over 30,000 known species worldwide. Pinalia sopoetanica is native to the tropical regions of New Guinea, where it can be found growing in the wild. The classification of Pinalia sopoetanica reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history.
